auth_methods.description: Use your ChatGPT login with Codex CLI (requires a paid ChatGPT subscription)
auth_methods.name: Login with ChatGPT

options.description: Codex can read files in the current workspace. Approval is required to edit files or access the internet.
options.name: Read Only

options.description: Codex can read and edit files in the current workspace, and run commands. Approval is required to access the internet or edit other files. (Identical to Agent mode)
options.name: Default

options.description: Codex can edit files outside this workspace and access the internet without asking for approval. Exercise caution when using.
options.name: Full Access

config_options.description: Choose an approval and sandboxing preset for your session
config_options.name: Approval Preset

options.description: Frontier model for complex coding, research, and real-world work.
options.name: GPT-5.5

options.description: Small, fast, and cost-efficient model for simpler coding tasks.
options.name: GPT-5.4-Mini

config_options.description: Choose which model Codex should use
config_options.name: Model

options.description: Balances speed and reasoning depth for everyday tasks
options.name: Medium

options.description: Greater reasoning depth for complex problems
options.name: High

options.description: Extra high reasoning depth for complex problems
options.name: Xhigh

config_options.description: Choose how much reasoning effort the model should use
config_options.name: Reasoning Effort

available_modes.description: Codex can read files in the current workspace. Approval is required to edit files or access the internet.
available_modes.name: Read Only

available_modes.description: Codex can read and edit files in the current workspace, and run commands. Approval is required to access the internet or edit other files. (Identical to Agent mode)
available_modes.name: Default

available_modes.description: Codex can edit files outside this workspace and access the internet without asking for approval. Exercise caution when using.
available_modes.name: Full Access
